title: Account Access — 2FA Lockout
description: User locked out due to lost 2FA device. Tests Account Access category, Customer Success routing, High priority.
subject: Lost my phone — cannot login due to 2FA, need account reset
body:
Hi support,

I lost my phone yesterday and I can no longer access my account because I cannot complete the two-factor authentication (2FA) step. I have an important deadline tomorrow and I need to access the platform urgently.

My account email is tom.obrien@quartzindustries.com.

Can you please help me reset my 2FA so I can log back in? I am happy to verify my identity with a government-issued ID or any other method you require.

I tried using the backup codes but I cannot find where I saved them (my fault). Please help.

Tom O'Brien
Operations Manager
Quartz Industries
